content.meaning.title: Names carry meaning
content.meaning.p: From Korean hanja meanings to English etymology and Japanese kanji. QARAH goes beyond simple recommendations, sharing the deep cultural significance behind every name it suggests.
content.privacy.title: Your Privacy
content.privacy.p: QARAH never sends or stores your photos on any server. All facial analysis runs entirely on your device. Once the analysis is complete, your photo data is immediately discarded.
footer.copyright: © 2026 QARAH. Every name has a calling.
upload.title: Upload your photo
upload.hint: Or take a photo with your camera
upload.tip3: Your face should fill 70%+ of the frame
upload.privacy: 🔒 Photos are analyzed on your device only. Nothing is stored.
page.tagline: ℹ️ QARAH — Discover the name hidden within your impression
countdown.hint: 💡 A name carries the impression of the person who holds it

alert.card_error: Failed to generate card. Please try again.
tweet.text: My impression is "{impression}" with "{emotion}" energy — QARAH matched me with "{name}"! #QARAH #NameMatch
